prs_created.description: ci: fix Python version from 3.10 to 3.12 in build-and-test workflow
fix(math): correct type signatures for copysign, fmod and curried bindings

merged_prs.description: fix(math): fix factorial signature and add missing constants/functions

notes: 10 unlabelled issues exist but are filtered by integrity policy - cannot read or label them. Issue #248 is an automated failure report (agentic-workflows label) - do not engage. Issue #249 is a tracking issue for the failed CI fix PR - human must apply manually. PR #251 (math fixes) was merged by maintainer and triggered release PR #252 for 5.0.0-rc.4.
